commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e7c19734e56c7da78d9394c496db3952648d7ffb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Feishu post `md` newline normalization, regression tests for post payload text, and a local proof script for the newline matrix.

PR surface: Source +62, Tests +110, Other +76. Total +248 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main sends normal Feishu post text into a single `md` element unchanged, and the linked issue plus PR tests show where a single-newline payload would be rewritten. A live Feishu client/API reproduction was not run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed because real Feishu proof is missing and the remaining code fixes affect delivery semantics rather than a safe proof-only automation path.

target.title: fix(feishu): upgrade single newlines to double newlines for post+md rendering (fixes #97074)
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #97074.

When OpenClaw sends messages to Feishu via `msg_type: post` with `tag: md`, single newline characters (`
`) are rendered as plain spaces by the Feishu IM API. Only `

` triggers a proper paragraph break, causing multi-line text to appear cramped.

## Why This Change Was Made

Feishu's post+md rendering treats a single 
 as a soft break (space), not a line break. The fix adds `normalizeFeishuNewlines()` which upgrades single 
 to 

 while preserving code blocks and block-level markdown structures (lists, blockquotes).

## Implementation

`normalizeFeishuNewlines()` preserves:
- Fenced code blocks (```...```) — internal line breaks stay intact
- Block-level structures (lists, blockquotes) — single 
 between list items stays so the list renders as one list, not separate paragraphs

## Evidence

**Proof script:** `scripts/proof-feishu-newline-normalize.mjs`

```
$ pnpm exec tsx scripts/proof-feishu-newline-normalize.mjs

=== Input/Output matrix (12 cases) ===

Single newline:      "Hello
World"         → "Hello

World"
Double newlines:     "A

B"              → "A

B"              (unchanged)
Mixed:               "A
B

C
D"      → "A

B

C

D"
No newlines:         "single line"          → "single line"           (unchanged)
Empty:               ""                     → ""
Code fence:          "Before
```
code
```
After"  → "Before

```
code
```

After"
Unordered list:      "- A
- B
- C"       → "- A
- B
- C"       (preserved)
Ordered list:        "1. A
2. B
3. C"    → "1. A
2. B
3. C"    (preserved)
Triple newlines:     "A


B"          → "A

B"
Leading/trailing:    "
A
B
"          → "

A

B

"
```

**Regression tests (30 tests):**
```
$ npx vitest run extensions/feishu/src/send.test.ts
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  30 passed (30)
```

## AI Assistance
- **AI-assisted**: Yes
- **Co-Authored-By**: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
target.author: zw-xysk
